---
title: "Epiweek 44, 2025"
date: 2025-10-26
categories: [2025, Q4]
description: "Weekly IDSR summary: Category 1 & 2 notifications, confirmed trends, and epitable for 26 October – 01 November 2025."
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Reporting period: **26 October – 01 November 2025** (CDC Epiweek 44, 2025)
:::

[View Report](../rendered/2025-W44-weekly-report.html){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[Download Word](../rendered/2025-W44-weekly-report.docx){.btn .btn-outline-primary download="2025-W44-weekly-report.docx"}
